title: Backported Wolves & Terralith - Compat
description: Adds tags from Backported Wolves mod to Terralith biomes
body:
### Backported Wolves + Terralith ❤️
\
This datapack adds tags (`spawns_black_wolf`, `spawns_snowy_wolf` etc.) from [Backported Wolves](https://modrinth.com/mod/backported-wolves) to all biomes from [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith). 

**All wolf variants are distributed depending on the temperature of the biome.**
